OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "ContextId": "0017x00001GkcjhAAB", "hpfList": [ { "hpfStatus": "Prospect", "checkFacilitytitle": 1, "Id": "0bS7x0000003ET3EAM", "ContractId": "8007x00000fDrN3AAK", "NPPATierFormulaValue": "140", "checked": true, "facilityTitle": "EE Assistant System Medical Officer", "NPPATier": "140", "accountName": "Independent HPS", "AccountId": "0017x00001IFmFxAAL", "Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c": "0017x00001JPgn3AAD" }, { "hpfStatus": "Prospect", "Id": "0bS7x0000003L9ZEAU", "ContractId": "8007x00000iiTzTAAU", "checkFacilitytitle": 0, "NPPATierFormulaValue": "120", "checked": true, "facilityTitle": "EE Nurse Practitioner", "NPPATier": "120", "accountName": "Naga Service Account", "AccountId": "0017x00001KsxtVAAR", "Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c": "0017x00001Igg8RAAR" } ], "ContractId": "8007x00000gUfiHAAS", "Err_RunningContext": "ClinicianContractAddHPF:CilinicianContract_GetFacilityForAddHPF", "Err_CtxId": "8007x00000gUfiHAAS", "Err_ProcessType": "IP", "isCalledFromAddHPF": true, "contractStartDate": "2025-08-01", "contractEndDate": "", "InvokeFrom": "AddHpf", "NPPATier": "", "ContractPrevNPPATier": 120, "omniScriptId": "0jN7x0000004ntNEAQ", "elementName": "IP_CreatePNC" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreatePNCRecords

childElements.name: DM_UpdateClinicianContract
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "IF(ISBLANK(%LA_CheckCorporateEntityOnNewHPF%),0,LISTSIZE(%LA_CheckCorporateEntityOnNewHPF%)) != LISTSIZE(%hpfList%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contractId" : "%ContractId%", "NPPATier" : "=%NPPATier%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMUpdateClinicianContract", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_CheckCorporateEntityOnNewHPF

childElements.name: SV_ContractDetails

childElements.description: Copies rates when same Service account is added again as different HPF - Facility title change usecase
